title: The King Thinks G-Man and Furries are Incompetent.
description:
Better if you watch in full screen. Not your average ear/mind rape, but a rather unique approach starring Mr. Marcooler and the world-famous G-Man. Be careful. Just because it's a short video doesn't mean that I can't put any goodies in there.

Song at the end is "Lost in the Supermarket" by Ben Folds.
